'''dhothathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vocimotor|vocimotor]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-th-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vocimotor|vocimotor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhothathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhothathithi|dhothathithi]] || [[word:dhothathiji|dhothathiji]] || [[word:dhothathishi|dhothathishi]] || [[word:dhothathiki|dhothathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhothathuthuthu|dhothathuthuthu]] || [[word:dhothathujuju|dhothathujuju]] || [[word:dhothathushushu|dhothathushushu]] || [[word:dhothathukuku|dhothathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhothathuthu|dhothathuthu]] || [[word:dhothathuju|dhothathuju]] || [[word:dhothathushu|dhothathushu]] || [[word:dhothathuku|dhothathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhothathufthuf|dhothathufthuf]] || [[word:dhothathufjuf|dhothathufjuf]] || [[word:dhothathufshuf|dhothathufshuf]] || [[word:dhothathufkuf|dhothathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhothathethe|dhothathethe]] || [[word:dhothatheje|dhothatheje]] || [[word:dhothatheshe|dhothatheshe]] || [[word:dhothatheke|dhothatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhothathothotho|dhothathothotho]] || [[word:dhothathojojo|dhothathojojo]] || [[word:dhothathoshosho|dhothathoshosho]] || [[word:dhothathokoko|dhothathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhothathotho|dhothathotho]] || [[word:dhothathojo|dhothathojo]] || [[word:dhothathosho|dhothathosho]] || [[word:dhothathoko|dhothathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhothathofthof|dhothathofthof]] || [[word:dhothathofjof|dhothathofjof]] || [[word:dhothathofshof|dhothathofshof]] || [[word:dhothathofkof|dhothathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhothathĂŻfthĂŻf|dhothathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhothathĂŻfjĂŻf|dhothathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhothathĂŻfshĂŻf|dhothathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhothathĂŻfkĂŻf|dhothathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhothathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhothathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhothathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhothathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhothathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhothathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhothathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhothathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhothathĂŻfthĂŻf|dhothathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhothathĂŻfjĂŻf|dhothathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhothathĂŻfshĂŻf|dhothathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhothathĂŻfkĂŻf|dhothathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhothathĂŻfthĂŻf|dhothathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhothathĂŻfjĂŻf|dhothathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhothathĂŻfshĂŻf|dhothathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhothathĂŻfkĂŻf|dhothathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhothathĂŠthĂŠ|dhothathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhothathĂŠjĂŠ|dhothathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhothathĂŠshĂŠ|dhothathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhothathĂŠkĂŠ|dhothathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhothathathatha|dhothathathatha]] || [[word:dhothathajaja|dhothathajaja]] || [[word:dhothathashasha|dhothathashasha]] || [[word:dhothathakaka|dhothathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhothathatha|dhothathatha]] || [[word:dhothathaja|dhothathaja]] || [[word:dhothathasha|dhothathasha]] || [[word:dhothathaka|dhothathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhothathafthaf|dhothathafthaf]] || [[word:dhothathafjaf|dhothathafjaf]] || [[word:dhothathafshaf|dhothathafshaf]] || [[word:dhothathafkaf|dhothathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhothathasha|dhothathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhothathshĂ«sha|dhothathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhothathrosha|dhothathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhothathmusha|dhothathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhothathyasha|dhothathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhothathnkshĂ«sha|godhothathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhothathnkrosha|godhothathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhothathnkmusha|godhothathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhothathnkyasha|godhothathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhothathathasha|dhothathathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhothathathshĂ«sha|dhothathathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhothathathrosha|dhothathathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhothathathmusha|dhothathathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhothathathyasha|dhothathathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhothathathnkshĂ«sha|godhothathathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhothathathnkrosha|godhothathathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhothathathnkmusha|godhothathathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhothathathnkyasha|godhothathathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhethĂŠthasha|dhethĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhethĂŠthshĂ«sha|dhethĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhethĂŠthrosha|dhethĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhethĂŠthmusha|dhethĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhethĂŠthyasha|dhethĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhethĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|godhethĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhethĂŠthnkrosha|godhethĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhethĂŠthnkmusha|godhethĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhethĂŠthnkyasha|godhethĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhothfathasha|dhothfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhothfathshĂ«sha|dhothfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhothfathrosha|dhothfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhothfathmusha|dhothfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhothfathyasha|dhothfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhothfathnkshĂ«sha|godhothfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhothfathnkrosha|godhothfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhothfathnkmusha|godhothfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhothfathnkyasha|godhothfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
